title: ollama/ollama
summary: The official Ollama CLI and server that lets you run Llama 2, CodeLlama, Mistral, Gemma, and other LLMs locally on macOS, Linux, and Windows with one command.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python library for Ollama; chat, generate, embed, pull, list, copy, delete models via simple Python calls.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers; same API surface as the Python library.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration that wraps Ollama endpoints as LLM, chat, and embedding components.

title: ollama-webui
summary: A feature-rich ChatGPT-style web UI for Ollama with multi-model chats, code highlighting, RAG, and admin panel.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama providing sync/async APIs, streaming, and embedding support.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Community-maintained Ruby gem for interacting with the Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Cross-platform TUI (text user interface) client for Ollama written in Rust.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that brings local Ollama models into GitHub Copilot’s chat sidebar.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart to deploy Ollama server and models on Kubernetes clusters with GPU support.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official Docker images (CPU & GPU) for running Ollama server containerized.

title: ollama-chat
summary: Minimal React chat app example consuming Ollama’s OpenAI-compatible endpoint.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Retrieval-augmented generation template using Ollama embeddings + Chroma vector DB.

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Slack bot that answers channel questions using any local Ollama model.

title: ollama-nestjs
summary: NestJS module providing injectable services for chat, embeddings, and model management.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET client for Ollama with async streaming and strongly-typed request/response models.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration by deepset allowing Ollama models as generators and embedders in pipelines.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Community Rust crate providing typed async bindings to the Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-rag-langchain
summary: End-to-end repo showing RAG with Ollama embeddings, LangChain, and Streamlit UI.

title: ollama-zig
summary: Zig client library for Ollama with comptime JSON parsing and async I/O.
